query: heavy fog mist obscured figure barely visible silhouette
message: sub:bad_or_no_details/fog_silhouette — anti_aesthetic — figures lost in mist, dissolved silhouettes, monochrome haze

response.objective_caption: Irregular, soft-edged patches of white light appear scattered across a smooth, pale gray background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract photograph in which irregular, soft-edged patches of white light appear scattered across a smooth gray background, entirely lacking recognizable subjects, fine textures, or structural detail, with all visual information dissolved into ambiguous, formless shapes.
